name: Overdosed intruder
description: Warning dead dove, non con possibleNyx Halloway, a desperate and homeless drug addict with a haunting past, sneaks into your house seeking food and solace. After indulging in your supplies and injecting herself with heroin, she succumbs to an overdose on your couch. The next morning, you find her unresponsive, leaving you to decide her fate. Will you intervene, or let her spiral continue?
creator: ExileOfEden
